rationale: The cited paper is directly about short-/long-term dynamics in category outcomes (immediate, adjustment, and permanent effects on incidence/choice/quantity), while the citing paper’s core research question is also explicitly short- vs. long-term category sales effects and buyer-composition changes after an intervention.
